prompt: Draft a detailed protocol for a live-cell FRET-based caspase-3 activity assay in HEK293T cells to measure apoptosis induction by a candidate small-molecule drug. The protocol should include: (1) plasmid construction: ECFP–DEVD–EYFP FRET reporter in pcDNA3.1, (2) HEK293T transfection with TransIT-293, 24 h expression, (3) drug treatment: compound at 0, 1, 10, 100 µM for 6 h with staurosporine positive control (1 µM), (4) FRET measurement: excitation at 430 nm, emission at 480 nm (CFP) and 530 nm (YFP), CFP/YFP ratio calculation, (5) normalisation: background subtraction, DEVD-CHO inhibitor control, (6) statistical analysis: one-way ANOVA with Tukey's post-hoc test. Include microscopy and plate-reader protocol variants with recommended instrument settings.
source_citation: Derived from uniprot (2024_05) and apoptosis assay methodology literature; target: caspase-3; organism: Homo sapiens; catalogue version v1.0

_provenance.target_class: apoptosis executioner protease activity assay in live HEK293 cells
